mapper.select: SELECT cr.chat_room_id AS chatRoomId, cr.chat_room_name AS chatRoomName, cr.chat_room_type AS chatRoomType, cr.region_id AS regionId, r.sido_name AS sidoName, r.sigungu_name AS sigunguName, cr.status, cr.created_at AS createdAt, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_member cm WHERE cm.chat_room_id = cr.chat_room_id AND cm.conn_status = 'ONLINE' AND cm.admin_status = 'NORMAL' ) AS onlineCount FROM chat_room cr LEFT JOIN region r ON r.region_id = cr.region_id WHERE cr.chat_room_type = 'REGION' ORDER BY cr.created_at DESC

SELECT cr.chat_room_id AS chatRoomId, cr.chat_room_name AS chatRoomName, cr.chat_room_type AS chatRoomType, cr.region_id AS regionId, r.sido_name AS sidoName, r.sigungu_name AS sigunguName, cr.status, cr.created_at AS createdAt, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_member cm WHERE cm.chat_room_id = cr.chat_room_id AND cm.conn_status = 'ONLINE' ) AS onlineCount FROM chat_room cr LEFT JOIN region r ON r.region_id = cr.region_id WHERE cr.chat_room_id = #{chatRoomId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_chat_room_id.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO chat_room ( chat_room_id, region_id, trip_id, chat_room_type, chat_room_name, status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{chatRoomId}, #{regionId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, NULL, #{chatRoomType}, #{chatRoomName}, #{status}, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_room WHERE chat_room_type IN ('REGION', 'WORKSPACE')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_room WHERE chat_room_type IN ('REGION', 'WORKSPACE') AND status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_message WHERE TRUNC(created_at) = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_room WHERE chat_room_type = #{type}

SELECT cm.chat_member_id AS chatMemberId, cm.chat_room_id AS chatRoomId, cm.member_id AS memberId, m2.nickname, cm.conn_status AS connStatus, cm.admin_status AS adminStatus, cm.joined_at AS joinedAt, cm.last_connected_at AS lastConnectedAt FROM chat_member cm JOIN member1 m ON m.member_id = cm.member_id JOIN member2 m2 ON m2.member_id = cm.member_id WHERE cm.chat_room_id = #{chatRoomId} AND cm.admin_status != 'KICKED' ORDER BY cm.joined_at DESC
